extortion.description: Saudi Icon specializes in design and build solutions, offering a holistic approach to construction and turn-key services. The company caters to a diverse clientele, including hotels, workspaces, restaurants, gyms, and healthcare facilities across Saudi Arabia. With a focus on creativity, functionality, and quality construction, Saudi Icon aims to redefine modern living through thoughtful design and tailored services. Their extensive portfolio showcases significant projects, along with a reputation for delivering high-end fit-out solutions and innovative constructions
